llmld:summary.one_liner: Free AI readiness audit for websites. Check if ChatGPT and Claude can understand your business.
key_facts: Enter any URL to get instant AI readiness score
Checks: meta description, llms.txt, LLM-LD, Schema.org, robots.txt
Traffic light scoring: Red (0-39), Amber (40-69), Green (70-100)
Free score shown instantly, detailed report requires email

audit_website.name: Audit a website for AI readiness
audit_website.step2: Enter the website URL to audit
audit_website.step4: Submit email to get detailed fix-it guide
